title: Cuneiform Tablet #0455: Middle Babylonian Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
